product_overview: NovaAI is a lightweight AI SaaS dashboard and marketing site that provides self-serve signup/login, a protected dashboard with Overview/Features/Settings tabs, and a Free→Pro upgrade flow (client-side mock auth persisted in localStorage) for rapid prototyping and product-led growth.
core_goals: Provide frictionless self-serve onboarding (signup → dashboard in <60s)
Protect dashboard content behind a simple auth guard persisted in localStorage
Expose tiered product experience (Free vs Pro) and increase Free→Pro conversions
Deliver a responsive, accessible dashboard with Overview, Features, and Settings
Keep all interactions client-side for fast local development and deterministic UX

features.name: Landing Page
features.description: Public marketing landing page with hero, features showcase, pricing, and CTAs that route users to signup/login.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> View hero section with CTA buttons -> Click Get Started button -> Navigate to /signup -> See signup form
Navigate to / -> Click Sign In to Dashboard button -> Navigate to /login -> See login form
Navigate to / -> Click Sign In to Dashboard button -> Navigate to /login -> AuthContext detects existing session -> Redirect to /dashboard -> See welcome message with user's name or email

features.name: User Login
features.description: Login flow that validates inputs, shows inline and form-level errors, shows a submit loading state, and redirects successful sign-ins to the protected dashboard.
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Fill email input field -> Fill password input field -> Click Sign In button to submit -> See loading spinner on submit button -> See redirect to /dashboard -> See welcome message with user's name or email
Navigate to /login -> Fill email input field with invalid format -> Fill password input field -> Click Sign In button to submit -> See inline validation error message on email field -> Submit blocked

Navigate to /login -> Fill email input field with valid format -> Fill password input field with incorrect credentials -> Click Sign In button to submit -> See form-level error banner indicating wrong credentials -> Stay on /login

features.name: User Signup
features.description: Signup flow that collects email/password/confirm password, shows a password strength indicator, validates inputs, persists session to localStorage, and redirects new users to the dashboard on success.
user_flows: Navigate to /signup -> Fill email input field with valid email -> Fill password input field -> See password strength indicator update (Weak/Good/Strong) -> Fill confirm password input field matching password -> Click Create Account button to submit -> See loading spinner on submit button -> Account created and session saved to localStorage -> Navigate to /dashboard -> See Free plan badge

Navigate to /signup -> Fill email input field -> Fill password input field -> Fill confirm password input field that does not match password -> Click Create Account button to submit -> See inline validation error on confirm password field -> Account not created

Navigate to /signup -> Fill email input field with an email that already exists -> Fill password input field -> Fill confirm password input field -> Click Create Account button to submit -> See form-level error banner indicating email already exists -> Stay on /signup

features.name: Dashboard Overview
features.description: Protected Overview tab showing stats cards, an upgrade banner for Free users, quick action buttons, and responsive navigation (sidebar or mobile menu).
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard -> AuthGuard mounts and rehydrates session -> See loading screen while auth rehydrates -> See Overview tab selected -> View stats cards (API calls, models, tokens, uptime) -> See upgrade banner if on Free plan -> Click quick action button to navigate to Features tab -> See Features tab content
Navigate to /dashboard -> AuthGuard mounts and rehydrates session -> No session found -> Redirect to /login -> See login form

features.name: Dashboard Features Tab
features.description: Features tab listing available AI capabilities with clear indicators of which items are locked behind the Pro plan and an upgrade CTA.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard -> Click Features tab -> See list of available AI features -> See Pro-only features marked as locked -> See upgrade banner if on Free plan
Navigate to /dashboard -> Click Features tab -> Click a locked Pro-only feature -> See prompt or upgrade banner asking user to upgrade -> Locked feature not accessible

features.name: Dashboard Settings Tab
features.description: Settings form to view and update display name and company, view account details, and sign out.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard -> Click Settings tab -> See Settings form with Name and Company fields and account details -> Edit display name field -> Edit company name field -> Click Save Changes button -> See success confirmation message
Navigate to /dashboard -> Click Settings tab -> Do not make any edits -> Observe Save Changes button is disabled when no changes have been made -> No save action occurs
Navigate to /dashboard -> Click Settings tab -> Click Log Out button -> Session cleared from localStorage -> Redirect to /login -> See login form

features.name: Upgrade to Pro
features.description: Client-side simulated upgrade flow accessible from the dashboard that updates the user's plan in AuthContext and persists it to localStorage, unlocking Pro features and updating UI badges.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard -> See Upgrade to Pro banner on Overview or Features tab -> Click Upgrade to Pro button on the upgrade banner -> See loading state for at least 1 second -> AuthContext updates plan to pro and persists to localStorage -> See plan badge update to "⚡ Pro" -> Upgrade banner disappears -> See success confirmation and previously locked features become accessible
Navigate to /dashboard -> See Upgrade to Pro banner -> Click Upgrade to Pro button -> See loading state -> Simulated upgrade fails -> See error message on the banner -> Plan remains Free

routes.description: Landing page with Navbar, Hero, Features, Pricing, and Footer sections
User login page with email and password form
User signup page with email, password, confirm password, and password strength indicator
Main dashboard with Overview, Features, and Settings tabs (protected by AuthGuard)

features.name: Landing Page
features.description: Marketing landing page with hero section, features showcase, pricing plans, and footer
user_interactions: View hero section with CTA buttons
Browse feature highlights
Compare pricing plans (Free vs Pro)
Navigate to login or signup via Navbar links
Click Get Started or Sign Up buttons

features.name: User Login
features.description: Login with email and password credentials, validates inputs, redirects to dashboard on success
user_interactions: Fill email input field
Fill password input field
Click Sign In button to submit
See validation error messages on invalid inputs
See error message on wrong credentials
Click link to navigate to signup page
Click logo link to navigate back to landing page

features.name: User Signup
features.description: Create account with email, password, and confirm password. Includes password strength indicator.
user_interactions: Fill email input field
Fill password input field
See password strength indicator (Weak/Good/Strong)
Fill confirm password input field
Click Create Account button to submit
See validation error messages on invalid inputs
See error if email already exists
Click link to navigate to login page
Click logo link to navigate back to landing page

features.name: Dashboard Overview
features.description: Dashboard overview tab showing stats cards, upgrade banner (free users), pro success banner, and quick action buttons
user_interactions: View stats cards (API calls, models, tokens, uptime)
See upgrade banner if on free plan
Click quick action buttons to navigate between tabs
Use sidebar navigation on desktop
Use mobile hamburger menu for navigation

features.name: Dashboard Features Tab
features.description: List of AI features available with pro/free indicators
user_interactions: View list of available AI features
See which features are locked behind Pro plan
See upgrade banner if on free plan

features.name: Dashboard Settings Tab
features.description: Settings form to update user name and company, view account details, and logout
user_interactions: Edit display name field
Edit company name field
Click Save Changes button
View account details (email, plan, member since)
Click Log Out button to sign out

features.name: Upgrade to Pro
features.description: Upgrade from free to pro plan via dashboard upgrade banner
user_interactions: Click Upgrade to Pro button on the upgrade banner
See plan status change from Free to Pro

known_limitations.issue: Authentication is mock-based using localStorage, no real backend API
known_limitations.impact: User data is only persisted in browser localStorage, not to a server

known_limitations.issue: No API calls, all data is client-side mock data
known_limitations.impact: Stats cards show hardcoded data, not real metrics
